subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God, Who hath manifested Himself through a light from amongst the lights of His Most Great Name upon the world when the earth shone forth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی تجلی بنور من انوار اسمه الاعظم علی العالم اذا اشرقت الارض و
subcodes.subjects: @station of the Manifestation of God, @praise and encouragement, @God's oneness [ahadiyyih and wahidiyyih]
